rules.rule_text:
title: Pubprn.vbs Proxy Execution
id: 1fb76ab8-fa60-4b01-bddd-71e89bf555da
status: test
description: Detects the use of the 'Pubprn.vbs' Microsoft signed script to execute
  commands.
references:
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Scripts/Pubprn/
author: frack113
date: 2022-05-28
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1216.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - \pubprn.vbs
    - 'script:'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
